Off Calendar Jul-14-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Andrew G. Ronan, Esq. for plaintiff and Matthew Diton, Esq. for defendant, both appearing on court call. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court orders the case dismissed without prejudice. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.
